---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for NutClient
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case
What problem are you trying to solve? Who would benefit from this?

## Proposed solution
What would you like NutClient to do? If you have an idea for the config option name or the script argument, mention it.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about, or workarounds you've tried.

## Additional context
Any other context, references to other NUT clients that have this feature, or screenshots.
